mapper.insert: INSERT INTO host_transfer_request ( party_id, requester_user_id, target_user_id, status, requested_at, responded_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{partyId}, #{requesterUserId}, #{targetUserId}, #{status}, #{requestedAt}, #{respondedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, party_id, requester_user_id, target_user_id, status, requested_at, responded_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM host_transfer_request WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, party_id, requester_user_id, target_user_id, status, requested_at, responded_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM host_transfer_request WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, party_id, requester_user_id, target_user_id, status, requested_at, responded_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM host_transfer_request WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status = 'REQUESTED' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, party_id, requester_user_id, target_user_id, status, requested_at, responded_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM host_transfer_request WHERE party_id = #{partyId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE host_transfer_request SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE host_transfer_request SET status = #{status}, responded_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE host_transfer_request SET status = #{status}, responded_at = NOW(), completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
